scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @drop8/shared build && cross-env NODE_ENV=development PORT=2567 tsx --tsconfig server/tsconfig.json server/src/index.ts
scripts.dev:lan: pnpm --filter @drop8/shared build && cross-env NODE_ENV=development DROP8_LAN=1 HOST=0.0.0.0 PORT=2567 tsx --tsconfig server/tsconfig.json server/src/index.ts
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @drop8/shared typecheck && pnpm --filter @drop8/shared build && pnpm --filter @drop8/client typecheck && pnpm --filter @drop8/server typecheck
scripts.lint: eslint --config eslint.config.ts shared/src shared/tests client/src server/src server/tests
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @drop8/shared build && pnpm --filter @drop8/shared test && pnpm --filter @drop8/server test
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @drop8/shared build && pnpm --filter @drop8/client build && pnpm --filter @drop8/server build
scripts.check: pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm test && pnpm build
scripts.start:lan: cross-env NODE_ENV=production DROP8_LAN=1 PORT=2567 node server/build/index.js
